basics.name: Pallab Roy
basics.label: AI Engineer
basics.summary: AI-native software engineer with half a decade of professional experience engineering production-grade, zero-data-retention AI pipelines. Specializing in AI agents, LangGraph, and RAG architectures that bridge the gap between raw data and deterministic business automation.

work.name: Independent AI Solutions Architect
work.summary: Partnering with founders of high-compliance advisory firms to audit and automate internal workflows.
highlights: Architecting agentic AI workflows powered by LangChain and LangGraph for complex web application automation.
Designing secure, multi-agent compliance screening engines for federal grant (FEMA) RFI reviews.

work.name: BASSETTI India
work.summary: Progressed from intern to full-time AI engineer delivering production-ready systems.
highlights: Architected zero-hallucination AI parsing engines to eliminate manual data entry bottlenecks.
Decreased manual processing time by 95% by replacing legacy manual data entry with localized, secure AI data pipelines.
Supported a user base of ~7000 processing ~1000 daily API requests with high availability.

work.name: Inceptial Technologies
work.summary: Full-stack software development for various client projects.
highlights: Developed and maintained scalable web applications and backend microservices.

education.institution: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology, West Bengal

projects.name: Autonomous Subscription Retention System
